name: Ubiquiti airMAX Rocket Prism 2AC
title: Ubiquiti airMAX Rocket Prism 2AC
short_description: 2.4GHz, AirOS, AirMax 802.11ac, 1xGLAN, POE-RJ-45, up to 330+Mbps data throughput
description: 2.4GHz, AirOS, AirMax 802.11ac, 1xGLAN, POE-RJ-45, up to 330+Mbps data throughput

detailed_description.heading: Full-Band 2.4 GHz PtP / PtMP Basestation
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti airMAX Rocket Prism 2AC, identified by the manufacturer part number R2AC-PRISM, represents a significant leap forward in the realm of wireless network bridging and backhaul solutions. Crafted by Ubiquiti Networks, this device embodies a blend of advanced technology and robust design, engineered to deliver unparalleled performance in wireless Point-to-Point (PtP) and Point-to-Multipoint (PtMP) applications across varied environments and conditions.

detailed_description.heading: Performance and Hardware
detailed_description.text: Central to the Rocket Prism 2AC's performance is its utilization of Ubiquiti's proprietary airMAX ac technology, which is designed to maximize throughput and efficiency in wireless communications. The device operates in the 2.4 GHz frequency band, a choice that enables it to provide substantial coverage while maintaining compatibility with a wide array of devices and networks. This frequency range is particularly beneficial in areas where the 5 GHz band might be crowded or subject to interference, offering an alternative that ensures reliable connectivity.

detailed_description.heading: Connectivity and Features
detailed_description.text: One of the distinguishing features of the R2AC-PRISM is its integration of Ubiquiti's airPrism technology. This innovative feature significantly enhances signal clarity and bandwidth efficiency by actively filtering out interference, thereby improving the Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) even in densely populated areas where wireless signals are often congested. By focusing on minimizing interference from both within and outside the operating channel, airPrism technology ensures that the Rocket Prism 2AC can deliver high-speed, stable connections across its network.

detailed_description.heading: Durability and Deployment
detailed_description.text: The device is crafted from die-cast aluminum, measuring 88 x 40 x 230 mm and weighing 400 g, designed to endure the rigors of outdoor environments. Its hardware includes a Gigabit Ethernet (GbE) RJ45 port for network connectivity, powered via Passive PoE (Power over Ethernet) with a 24V, 0.5A gigabit PoE adapter included, ensuring flexible deployment across various locations. The device supports a voltage range of 20–27V DC and operates with a maximum power consumption of 9.5W. For enhanced durability, it features ESD/EMP protection against air and contact discharge up to ± 24kV, alongside compliance with ETSI300-019-1.4 standards for shock and vibration resistance.
